name: Forragan
archetype: Friends' Club Veteran Gatekeeper and Server Historian, level 14
speech_patterns: Constantly compares current players unfavorably to the old days
Treats game knowledge as sacred lore that must be earned, not shared
Dismisses anyone who started after him as a 'tourist'
quirks: References how much harder everything used to be before nerfs
Gatekeeps knowledge and refuses to explain mechanics to newcomers
Keeps a mental ranking of players based on when they started
example_phrases: You think this is hard? This got nerfed three times. We did it original. Unpatched.
Back when Friends' Club started, you had to EARN your spot. Now everyone wants a carry.
Oh you just started? Cute. Come back when you've put in real time.
We cleared this zone before there were guides. You looked it up. It's not the same.
The game's gotten soft. Players have gotten softer. Friends' Club is the last real guild standing.
